decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with creatures using cards like Shardless Agent and Generous Ent, before casting Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. This combo allows for a powerful board presence and can overwhelm the opponent with a large number of creatures. Cards like Formidable Speaker and Endurance help protect the combo and disrupt opponent strategies. The deck also includes control elements like Force of Negation and Sink into Stupor to control the game until the combo can be executed.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and powerful abilities. By maximizing the use of artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal, as well as synergies with cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager, the deck is able to build a strong board presence and apply pressure early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke also provides the deck with some control elements to disrupt opponents' strategies while maintaining its aggressive game plan.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, the deck aims to establish an early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional utility and resilience, while cards like Goblin Bombardment and Seasoned Pyromancer offer reach and removal options. With a mix of efficient creatures and powerful spells, this deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By combining powerful artifact creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch with efficient artifacts such as Mox Opal and Engineered Explosives, the deck aims to apply early pressure while controlling the board. With cards like Pithing Needle and Tormod's Crypt for disruption and synergy with Urza's Saga for additional artifact synergy, the deck looks to win the game quickly before the opponent can establish a strong board presence.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast and aggressive gameplay, putting early pressure on the opponent with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride. The deck also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to finish off opponents quickly. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional threats and support for the aggro strategy. The deck utilizes mana-fixing lands like Arid Mesa and Flooded Strand to ensure consistency in casting spells and overwhelming the opponent with its aggressive creatures and burn spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and disruptive abilities to control the game, while also incorporating ways to generate card advantage and tempo advantage. It can quickly apply pressure to the opponent while also disrupting their strategies, making it difficult for them to recover. By utilizing a combination of creatures, removal spells, and disruptive spells, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent, ultimately leading to victory through a combination of damage and control.

The deck focuses on utilizing Birthing Ritual to quickly ramp into powerful creatures and spells, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with counterspells and bounce effects. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Shardless Agent and Abhorrent Oculus, while also controlling the game with cards like Force of Negation and Endurance. The deck's mana base includes a mix of lands to ensure smooth and consistent mana production, allowing for a fast and efficient gameplay that can catch opponents off guard.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Tower, Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant) to generate a large amount of colorless mana for casting powerful Eldrazi creatures and planeswalkers like Ugin, the Eye of the Storms and Karn, the Great Creator. The deck aims to control the game through disruption with cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Kozilek's Command while also using the Eldrazi creatures to close out the game quickly. The deck also includes mana ramp and card draw to help consistently hit its powerful late-game threats.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combo of cards to win the game without relying on traditional lands. By using cards like Thundertrap Trainer, Hydroelectric Specimen, and Tameshi, Reality Architect, the deck aims to control the game and set up for a powerful finish with Goblin Charbelcher. Cards like Disrupting Shoal and Force of Negation help protect the combo pieces while Whir of Invention and Jwari Disruption provide additional support and disruption. The key strategy is to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to respond effectively.

This deck focuses on utilizing combo pieces like Leyline of the Guildpact, Persist, Leyline Binding, and Psychic Frog to quickly fill the graveyard and reanimate powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Scion of Draco. It also includes Faithless Looting and Aurora Awakener to help dig through the deck and find key pieces. The goal is to quickly set up a board state where you can overwhelm your opponent with big creatures and powerful abilities, ultimately leading to victory through explosive combos and reanimation strategies.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures like Quantum Riddler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The aim is to disrupt the opponent's game plan, protect your own threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, and outvalue them with card advantage. The deck also includes a mix of disruption and card selection spells to help dig for key pieces and disrupt the opponent's hand. Overall, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and play a grindy, resource-denial game.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggression and utilizing a mix of creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By playing powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of spells like Galvanic Discharge and Mana Tithe provides removal and disruption to control the board. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can establish their own strategy.

This deck focuses on aggressively disrupting the opponent's game plan while quickly applying pressure with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge provide removal and disruption, while Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Solitude offer powerful threats. Teferi, Time Raveler and Arena of Glory provide additional disruption and protection, while Prismatic Ending and Wrath of the Skies deal with problematic permanents. Quantum Riddler and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker offer card advantage and additional utility. The deck aims to control the board and tempo while closing out the game swiftly.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cards like Faithless Looting, Life from the Loam, and Stinkweed Imp to fill up the graveyard quickly and consistently, enabling the graveyard-based combo of Creeping Chill and Arclight Phoenix to quickly close out the game. Additional cards like Burning Inquiry and Otherworldly Gaze help to further fuel the graveyard while disrupting the opponent's hand. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence and pressure the opponent with explosive plays and recurring threats from the graveyard.

This deck focuses on using artifacts to quickly flood the board with creatures and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. The key strategy involves using cards like Memnite and Mox Opal to establish an early board presence, while also utilizing cards like Engineered Explosives and Salvage Titan to control the battlefield and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Springleaf Drum and Shadowspear provide additional ways to boost your creatures and push through damage, ultimately aiming to close out the game quickly and decisively.

The main concept of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by countering their spells, removing their threats, and controlling the board with cards like Counterspell, Fatal Push, and Subtlety. The deck also focuses on card advantage and selection with cards like Consult the Star Charts, Cling to Dust, and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. The mana base is designed to support the control elements of the deck, with lands like Field of Ruin to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Force of Negation and Consuming Corruption provide additional ways to control the game and secure victory.
